headline: IEA’s Birol urges Iraq-Turkey pipeline as Hormuz closure persists
summary: Investing.com -- With the Strait of Hormuz remaining a volatile bottleneck for global energy markets, International Energy Agency (IEA) Executive Director Fatih Birol has called for the construction of a new oil pipeline connecting Iraq’s southern Basra fields to the Turkish Mediterranean terminal in Ceyhan.

headline: Can crude oil stockpiles in Asia outlast the Middle East conflict?
summary: Investing.com -- Global markets have signaled a growing sense of optimism that the ongoing U.S.-Iran conflict, now in its 45th day, will reach a negotiated settlement by the end of April.
